Gemini.//: AI formation suggestions. Create a free API key at Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com) and set it via the Gemini__ApiKey env var (Render) or user-secrets locally — do NOT commit a real key here. Left blank, the /api/formations/suggest endpoint reports configured:false and the UI falls back to templates. Model defaults to gemini-2.5-flash.

Clerk.//: From your Clerk application. Authority = the Frontend API / Issuer URL, e.g. https://your-app.clerk.accounts.dev. AuthorizedParty = your app origin (http://localhost:5199 in dev). DevUserId is optional: set it to your Clerk user id to seed demo data onto your account locally.
